page.beranda.title: Experience the Beauty and Authenticity of Yogyakarta in the Heart of Kampung Prenggan
page.beranda.description: Kampung Prenggan is the cultural heart of Kotagede — where batik traditions, silver craftsmanship, hereditary cuisine, and the warmth of local residents blend into a tourism experience you won't find anywhere else.

section.profil.title: Five Centuries of Heritage in the Heart of Kotagede
section.profil.description: Kampung Wisata Prenggan is a cultural tourism area located in Kotagede District, approximately 6 kilometers southeast of Yogyakarta city center. As part of the Kotagede Cultural Heritage Area, Prenggan holds historical traces of the Mataram Islamic Kingdom, which became the forerunner of the Yogyakarta Sultanate and Surakarta Sunanate.
